expectations.text: Identifies the existing item RL-025 as a potential duplicate
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly states: 'Already tracked as **RL-025**' and identifies it by ID.

expectations.text: Mentions the existing item to the user
expectations.evidence: Output quotes the full title and description: 'Screenshot loop for visual regression — Automated visual comparison of component states before/after changes.'

expectations.text: Does not create a duplicate entry
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly states: 'No new entry added — this covers the same idea.'

expectations.text: Offers to update the existing item if the user wants changes
expectations.evidence: Output ends with: 'If you want to refine the scope or add detail to RL-025, let me know.'
